title: hari forecast record (Jarvis Track J2)
description: One testable expectation emitted by a hari belief, plus (once resolved) the matched outcome and score. DRAFT v0.1.0 — hari-side review required before any implementation; see 2026-07-02-hari-forecast-record.contract.md.

forecast_id.description: UUIDv7 — sortable by emission time, same convention as algedonic signal ids.

belief_id.description: The hari belief this forecast operationalizes. When contradictory beliefs coexist, EACH emits its own forecast — resolution is driven by which keeps winning.

observable.description: WHERE the outcome will be read from, pinned at emission time so scoring is mechanical, not interpretive.

source.description: Repo-relative artifact path in the producing repo (e.g. ga:state/fleet/presence.json).

predicate.description: The claim being forecast, as an equality/inequality over the field (e.g. == green).

probability.description: P(predicate holds at horizon). 0.5 is an honest 'no idea' — never omit a forecast because the belief is uncertain.

rationale.description: Optional one-liner tying the number back to the belief state.

horizon.description: When the observable is to be read. One forecast, one resolution — no rolling windows in v0.1.

resolution.description: Written by the scorer once the horizon passes. Absent = pending. A forecast whose observable is unreadable at horizon resolves as 'void', never silently dropped.

brier.description: (probability - outcome)^2 with outcome in {0,1}; null/absent for void.

supersedes.description: forecast_id this record replaces (belief updated before horizon). Same non-breaking-shift pattern as optick-sae-artifact.
